creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #9)
> Maybe I've missed something (that's quite possible) but it seems that
> nothing was done at all?
> 
> The following ports are among the very last to be pruned, but now it's their
> time:
> 
> devel/arm-eabi-gcc
> devel/cross-gcc
> sysutils/u-boot-beaglebone-eabi (cascade)
> devel/cross-binutils (no purpose)
> devel/arm-eabi-binutils (no purpose)
> 
> 
> Everyone knows that 1 September was the death-date, right?  Is there any
> information I'm missing?  (real work, not promises)

Confirmed that nothing is going to be done for these ports.
